productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Adi Wind Yellow Flip Flops
description: This pair of Vigor canvas shoes from adidas is light and comfortable on the feet. In a funky blue and red combination, it's a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Upper Canvas upper for durability, comfort, breathability and easy maintenance Synthetic leather strips on the sides of the midfoot to represent adidas' logo and for enhanced midfoot support Long and padded tongue for comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Durable rubber toe box and toe guard Brand badge appliqué d on the tongue Padded sockliner for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for durability and cushioning Outsole Durable rubber outsole with circular lugs for maximum traction and grip shoe care Wipe dirt off with a moist cloth To remove tough stains, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
